originalTitle: How To Open a Trump Account? Everything Parents Need to Know About Eligibility and the $1,000 Treasury Contribution
summary: President Donald Trump highlighted the launch of Trump Accounts during a July 6 White House event, days after the federal savings program became available. Parents, legal guardians and other authorized individuals can now begin opening accounts for eligible children. Here’s...
content:
Benzinga and Yahoo Finance LLC may earn commission or revenue on some items through the links below.

President Donald Trump highlighted the launch of Trump Accounts during a July 6 White House event, days after the federal savings program became available. Parents, legal guardians and other authorized individuals can now begin opening accounts for eligible children. Here's what you need to know.

Trump Accounts are tax-deferred investment accounts for eligible U.S. children under age 18. Children who are U.S. citizens and born between Jan. 1, 2025, and Dec. 31, 2028, may also qualify for a one-time $1,000 contribution from the U.S. Department of the Treasury. The account is designed to encourage long-term investing for children, with contributions automatically invested in a fund that tracks the S&P 500.

The Average Family's Finances Are More Complicated Than Ever. These Tools Aim To Make Them Easier To Manage.

Think Your 'Safe' Stocks Protect You? You're Ignoring the Real Growth Triggers — Here's What to Add Now

Parents, legal guardians and other authorized individuals, including grandparents and adult siblings, can elect to open a Trump Account for an eligible child by filing IRS Form 4547. However, only one Trump Account may be established for each child. The first authorized individual to complete the activation process becomes the account's responsible party and manages it until the child reaches age 18.

To be eligible, the child must be under age 18, have a valid Social Security number and not already have a Trump Account. To receive the one-time $1,000 Treasury contribution, the child must also be a U.S. citizen born between Jan. 1, 2025, and Dec. 31, 2028.

The first step is determining whether your child is eligible. The child must be under age 18, have a valid Social Security number and not already have a Trump Account. Children born between Jan. 1, 2025, and Dec. 31, 2028, who are U.S. citizens may also qualify for the one-time $1,000 Treasury contribution.

Trending: Caught With Nothing Saved for Retirement? These 5 Game‑Changing Tips Could Still Save You

Next, complete IRS Form 4547. Parents, legal guardians and other authorized individuals can file the form with a federal tax return, through an IRS Online Account after verifying their identity with ID.me, or through the Trump Accounts website or mobile app.

After the IRS processes the election, activate the account through the Trump Accounts app or at TrumpAccounts.gov. During activation, you'll verify your identity, create login credentials and enter information for both yourself and your child, including names, dates of birth and Social Security numbers exactly as they appeared on IRS Form 4547.

Once activation is complete, you'll receive a confirmation email. If you already submitted IRS Form 4547 with your 2025 tax return, you don't need to do anything further until you're notified that the account is ready to activate. Parents with multiple eligible children can add them to the same dashboard after activation.

Beginning July 4, 2026, parents, relatives and friends can collectively contribute up to $5,000 per child each year. Employers may contribute up to $2,500 annually per employee, with those contributions counting toward the annual limit. Qualified contributions from eligible nonprofit organizations and state or local governments may also be deposited under certain circumstances.

See Also: Think you're saving enough for your kids? You might be dangerously off — see why

Eligible children will automatically receive the one-time $1,000 Treasury contribution after the account is established and eligibility requirements are met. That contribution does not count toward the annual contribution limit.

The account has no activation or maintenance fees. Contributions are automatically invested in SPYM, an exchange-traded fund that tracks the S&P 500 by holding hundreds of large U.S. companies. While the investment can grow over time, returns are not guaranteed and remain subject to market risk.

The program continues to gain momentum following its July 4 launch. During a July 6 White House event, Trump said the federal government had funded the first 500,000 Trump Accounts with an initial $1,000 contribution for eligible children born between Jan. 1, 2025, and Dec. 31, 2028.

Trump also encouraged eligible families to enroll, while several companies, including Dell Technologies Inc. , Advanced Micro Devices Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. , have pledged support for the initiative through employer contributions or additional funding.

Building Wealth Across More Than Just the Market

Building a resilient portfolio means thinking beyond a single asset or market trend. Economic cycles shift, sectors rise and fall, and no one investment performs well in every environment. That's why many investors look to diversify with platforms that provide access to real estate, fixed-income opportunities, precious metals, and even self-directed retirement accounts. By spreading exposure across multiple asset classes, it becomes easier to manage risk, capture steady returns, and create long-term wealth that isn't tied to the fortunes of just one company or industry.

Backed by Jeff Bezos, Arrived Homes makes real estate investing accessible with a low barrier to entry. Investors can buy fractional shares of single-family rentals and vacation homes starting with as little as $100 . This allows everyday investors to diversify into real estate, collect rental income, and build long-term wealth without needing to manage properties directly.

Farmland has historically held its value through market volatility and delivered returns uncorrelated to stocks and bonds. For accredited investors, FarmTogether offers direct access to high-quality U.S. farmland starting at $15,000 — fully managed, with no landlord headaches.

chineseTitle: 如何开设特朗普账户？家长需要了解的有关资格和 1,000 美元国库捐款的所有信息
chineseSummary: 在联邦储蓄计划推出几天后，唐纳德·特朗普总统在 7 月 6 日的白宫活动中强调了特朗普账户的推出。父母、法定监护人和其他授权个人现在可以开始为符合条件的儿童开设账户。这是...
chineseContent:
Benzinga 和 Yahoo Finance LLC 可能通过以下链接赚取某些项目的佣金或收入。

在联邦储蓄计划推出几天后，唐纳德·特朗普总统在 7 月 6 日的白宫活动中强调了特朗普账户的推出。父母、法定监护人和其他授权个人现在可以开始为符合条件的儿童开设账户。这是您需要了解的内容。

特朗普账户是针对符合条件的 18 岁以下美国儿童的延税投资账户。出生于 2025 年 1 月 1 日至 2028 年 12 月 31 日之间的美国公民儿童也可能有资格从美国财政部一次性获得 1,000 美元的捐款。该账户旨在鼓励儿童进行长期投资，捐款自动投资于追踪标准普尔 500 指数的基金。

普通家庭的财务状况比以往任何时候都更加复杂。这些工具旨在使它们更易于管理。

您认为“安全”股票可以保护您吗？你忽略了真正的增长触发因素——以下是现在要添加的内容

父母、法定监护人和其他授权个人（包括祖父母和成年兄弟姐妹）可以通过提交 IRS 表格 4547 选择为符合条件的孩子开设特朗普账户。但是，每个孩子只能设立一个特朗普账户。第一个完成激活过程的授权个人将成为该帐户的责任方并对其进行管理，直至孩子年满 18 岁。

要符合资格，孩子必须年满 18 岁、拥有有效的社会安全号码且尚未拥有特朗普账户。要获得一次性 1,000 美元的财政部捐款，孩子还必须是出生于 2025 年 1 月 1 日至 2028 年 12 月 31 日之间的美国公民。

第一步是确定您的孩子是否符合资格。孩子必须年满 18 岁，拥有有效的社会安全号码，并且还没有特朗普账户。 2025 年 1 月 1 日至 2028 年 12 月 31 日期间出生的美国公民儿童也可能有资格获得一次性 1,000 美元的财政部捐款。

热门话题：没有为退休储蓄？这 5 个改变游戏规则的技巧仍然可以拯救你

接下来，填写 IRS 表格 4547。父母、法定监护人和其他授权个人可以在使用 ID.me 验证身份后通过 IRS 在线账户或通过 Trump Accounts 网站或移动应用程序将该表格与联邦纳税申报表一起提交。

IRS 处理选举后，通过 Trump Accounts 应用程序或 TrumpAccounts.gov 激活帐户。在激活过程中，您将验证您的身份、创建登录凭据并输入您自己和您孩子的信息，包括姓名、出生日期和社会安全号码，与 IRS 表格 4547 上显示的信息完全相同。

激活完成后，您将收到一封确认电子邮件。如果您已随 2025 年纳税申报表提交了 IRS 表格 4547，则在收到帐户已准备好激活的通知之前，您无需执行任何进一步操作。拥有多个符合条件的孩子的家长可以在激活后将他们添加到同一个仪表板。

从 2026 年 7 月 4 日开始，父母、亲戚和朋友每年可以为每个孩子总共捐款最多 5,000 美元。雇主每年可为每位雇员缴纳最多 2,500 美元，这些捐款计入年度限额。在某些情况下，也可以存入符合资格的非营利组织以及州或地方政府的合格捐款。

另请参阅：您认为您为孩子存的钱足够了吗？你可能会陷入危险——看看为什么

账户设立并满足资格要求后，符合资格的儿童将自动收到一次性 1,000 美元的国库捐款。该捐款不计入年度捐款限额。

该帐户没有激活费或维护费。捐款会自动投资于 SPYM，这是一种交易所交易基金，通过持有数百家美国大型公司来追踪标准普尔 500 指数。虽然投资可以随着时间的推移而增长，但回报并不能得到保证，并且仍然面临市场风险。

该计划自 7 月 4 日推出以来，势头持续强劲。在 7 月 6 日的白宫活动中，特朗普表示，联邦政府已为首批 50 万个特朗普账户提供了资金，并为 2025 年 1 月 1 日至 2028 年 12 月 31 日期间出生的符合条件的儿童提供了 1,000 美元的初始捐款。

特朗普还鼓励符合条件的家庭加入，而包括戴尔科技公司、超微半导体公司和美光科技公司在内的几家公司已承诺通过雇主捐款或额外资金支持该计划。

继续阅读：还在了解市场吗？这 50 个必须知道的术语可以帮助您快速跟上

不仅仅在市场上创造财富

建立有弹性的投资组合意味着超越单一资产或市场趋势的思维。经济周期发生变化，行业兴衰，没有一项投资在所有环境下都能表现良好。这就是为什么许多投资者希望通过提供房地产、固定收益机会、贵金属甚至自我管理退休账户的平台来实现多元化。通过将风险分散到多个资产类别，可以更轻松地管理风险、获得稳定的回报并创造不只与一家公司或行业的命运挂钩的长期财富。

在杰夫·贝索斯 (Jeff Bezos) 的支持下，Arrived Homes 使房地产投资变得更容易，进入门槛较低。投资者只需 100 美元即可购买单户出租屋和度假屋的部分股份。这使得日常投资者能够多元化投资房地产、收取租金收入并建立长期财富，而无需直接管理房产。

农田历来在市场波动中保持其价值，并提供与股票和债券无关的回报。对于经过认证的投资者来说，FarmTogether 可以直接购买高质量的美国农田，起价为 15,000 美元——完全管理，没有房东的麻烦。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
